languages.text: {n}Недвижимая гримаса, замершая на бледном лице раненого, не позволяет определить, насколько он увлечен вашим рассказом. Не вполне ясно, понимает ли он хоть что-нибудь из ваших слов — однако, стонов вы больше не слышите.{/n}

{n}The grimace fixed on the wounded man's pale face makes it impossible to tell how much attention he is paying to your story. It is not clear if he understands anything you are saying, but you do not hear any more moans.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Недвижимая гримаса, замершая на бледном лице раненого, не позволяет определить, насколько он увлечен вашим рассказом. Не вполне ясно, понимает ли он хоть что-нибудь из ваших слов — однако, стонов вы больше не слышите.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The grimace fixed on the wounded man's pale face makes it impossible to tell how much attention he is paying to your story. It is not clear if he understands anything you are saying, but you do not hear any more moans.{/n}

{n}The grimace fixed on the wounded man's pale face makes it impossible to tell how much attention he is paying to your story. It is not clear if he understands anything you are saying, but you do not hear any more moans.{/n}

{n}The grimace fixed on the wounded man's pale face makes it impossible to tell how much attention he is paying to your story. It is not clear if he understands anything you are saying, but you do not hear any more moans.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Angesichts der Grimasse auf dem blassen Gesicht des verwundeten Mannes kannst du nicht beurteilen, wie viel Beachtung er deiner Geschichte schenkt. Es ist unklar, ob er deine Worte versteht, aber immerhin hörst du ihn nicht mehr stöhnen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The grimace fixed on the wounded man's pale face makes it impossible to tell how much attention he is paying to your story. It is not clear if he understands anything you are saying, but you do not hear any more moans.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Angesichts der Grimasse auf dem blassen Gesicht des verwundeten Mannes kannst du nicht beurteilen, wie viel Beachtung er deiner Geschichte schenkt. Es ist unklar, ob er deine Worte versteht, aber immerhin hörst du ihn nicht mehr stöhnen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La grimace fixée sur le visage exsangue du blessé vous empêche de savoir s'il vous écoute vraiment. Vous ne sauriez dire s'il comprend un traître mot de ce que vous racontez, mais en tout cas, ses gémissements ont cessé.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The grimace fixed on the wounded man's pale face makes it impossible to tell how much attention he is paying to your story. It is not clear if he understands anything you are saying, but you do not hear any more moans.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La grimace fixée sur le visage exsangue du blessé vous empêche de savoir s'il vous écoute vraiment. Vous ne sauriez dire s'il comprend un traître mot de ce que vous racontez, mais en tout cas, ses gémissements ont cessé.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伤员苍白的脸上凝固着扭曲的痛苦表情，让人无法分辨他究竟听进去了多少，也弄不清他是否听懂了你的话，但你确实没再听到他的呻吟。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The grimace fixed on the wounded man's pale face makes it impossible to tell how much attention he is paying to your story. It is not clear if he understands anything you are saying, but you do not hear any more moans.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伤员苍白的脸上凝固着扭曲的痛苦表情，让人无法分辨他究竟听进去了多少，也弄不清他是否听懂了你的话，但你确实没再听到他的呻吟。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La mueca del hombre herido hace imposible saber cuánta atención está prestando a tu historia. Aunque no te queda claro si entiende tus palabras, por lo menos no oyes más gemidos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The grimace fixed on the wounded man's pale face makes it impossible to tell how much attention he is paying to your story. It is not clear if he understands anything you are saying, but you do not hear any more moans.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La mueca del hombre herido hace imposible saber cuánta atención está prestando a tu historia. Aunque no te queda claro si entiende tus palabras, por lo menos no oyes más gemidos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}傷ついた男の青白い顔に浮かぶ不動の険しい表情からは、彼がどれほどあなたの話に夢中になっているかはわからない。彼があなたの話を理解しているかどうかは定かではないが、それ以上のうめき声は聞こえない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The immovable grimace on the wounded man's pale face makes it impossible to tell how much he is engrossed in your story. It's not clear if he understands anything you say, but you don't hear any more moans.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yaralı adamın solgun yüzündeki sabitlenmiş yüz buruşturması, hikâyenize ne kadar dikkat ettiğini söylemeyi imkânsız kılıyor. Söylediğin hiçbir şeyi anlayıp anlamadığı net olmasa da artık inleme duymuyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The grimace fixed on the wounded man's pale face makes it impossible to tell how much attention he is paying to your story. It is not clear if he understands anything you are saying, but you do not hear any more moans.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yaralı adamın solgun yüzündeki sabitlenmiş yüz buruşturması, hikâyenize ne kadar dikkat ettiğini söylemeyi imkânsız kılıyor. Söylediğin hiçbir şeyi anlayıp anlamadığı net olmasa da artık inleme duymuyorsun.{/n}
